nodes.title: Welcome to the District Court of Appeals

heroDescription.processed: The District Court of Appeals is committed to the fair and impartial administration of justice. We provide accessible court services and resolve disputes through the rule of law.
heroDescription.summary: The District Court of Appeals is committed to the fair and impartial administration of justice. We provide accessible court services and resolve disputes through the rule of law.

ctaDescription.processed: Whether you are filing a new case, responding to a complaint, or seeking information about court procedures, our clerk's office is here to assist you.
ctaDescription.summary: Whether you are filing a new case, responding to a complaint, or seeking information about court procedures, our clerk's office is here to assist you.
